title: cirsium × autareticum
intro: Cirsium × autareticum, also known as the hybrid thistle or cotton thistle, is a cross between the Cirsium heterophyllum and Cirsium vulgare species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve stomach issues due to its high content of saponins and sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Cirsium × autareticum include its potential to reduce inflammation, lower blood sugar levels, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions by drying the flowers and leaves to be used as a natural remedy for various health conditions.
